title: senecio balensis
intro: Senecio balensis, also known as Balansa ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio balensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve respiratory function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Senecio balensis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
